posts.raw_content:
Proverbs 25:28 nkjv
"Whoever has no rule over his own spirit is like a city broken down, with no walls"

Do the tough things. Have self control. Make the hard decisions. Do what is best for your family, follow Christ in everything you do. Do not give in to temptation. 
This scripture reminds me and inspires me to get up everyday and first thank the Lord, spend time in prayer and Bible study. Then to eat healthy, work out, go out and provide for my family and lead them as the Lord wants me to. To not give in to things or behaviors that would harm myself, the ones I love, or be displeasing to our Lord Jesus Christ. 
Its a challenge sometimes to not have that drink or to let anger cause a lack of patience, but the Lord is with me always and hears my prayers when I ask him for the self control and strength I need to be who he wants me to be. 
I don't always succeed because I am imperfect. But our Lord is perfect, he hears our prayers and knows what we need.
Go to him. Seek him. Ask him to lead you everyday. 
And he will bless you.
God bless!
